name: Aviz FTAS
description: Fabric Test Automation Suite (FTAS) is a comprehensive automated testing suite for SONiC comprising 500+ test cases, validating feature quality across multi-vendor hardware and ASIC platforms.

name: SAI Challenger by PLVision
description: An open-source framework for SAI functional and integration testing built on SONiC's native infrastructure, enabling fast testing of any SAI implementation.
